spouse.name: Ragnall Mac Somairle Lord of the Isles
Reginald Muir of Polkelly, King of the Northern Isles and Argyll "having descended from the O'Moores of Ireland. The Muirs of Polkelly may have been the senior Muir line."

zh.lifeSummary: 當Fonia Moray於1145年出生在蘇格蘭艾爾金爾時，她的父親Ranulf de Moray26歲，母親Bethoc MacFergus of Moray21歲。她於大約1160年與Ragnall Mac Somairle Lord of the Isles在蘇格蘭結婚。他們至少是9個兒子和6個女兒的父母。她去世於1200年在蘇格蘭阿吉爾金泰爾享年55歲，埋葬在蘇格蘭阿吉爾金泰爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Fonia Moray于1145年出生在苏格兰艾爾金爾时，她的父亲Ranulf de Moray26岁，母亲Bethoc MacFergus of Moray21岁。她于大约1160年与Ragnall Mac Somairle Lord of the Isles在苏格兰结婚。他们至少是9个儿子和6个女儿的父母。她去世于1200年在苏格兰阿吉爾金泰爾享年55岁，埋葬在苏格兰阿吉爾金泰爾。

nameMeanings.name: Moray
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Irish (Limerick and Cork): variant of   Moore   4.
English (of Norman origin): from the Old French personal name Mory, a pet form of Amauri (see Amery ).
English: perhaps also a variant of   Moore   1–3.

variants.name: Morrey
meanings: English (of Norman origin): variant of   Morey  .

variants.name: Moore
meanings: English: from Middle English more ‘moor, marsh, fen’ (Old English mōr), hence a topographic name for someone who lived in such a place, or a habitational name from any of various places called with this word, as for example Moore in Cheshire or More in Shropshire.
English (of Norman origin): ethnic name from Old French more ‘Moor’, either someone from North Africa or, more often, a nickname for someone thought to resemble a Moor. Compare Morrell and Moreau .

English (of Norman origin): from the Middle English personal name More (Old French More, Maur, Latin Maurus), originally denoting either ‘Moor’ or someone with a swarthy complexion (compare Morrell , Morrin , Morris , and sense 2 above). There was a 6th-century Christian saint of this name.

variants.name: Moree
meanings: French (Morée): habitational name from a place so named in Loir-et-Cher.

variants.name: Morie
meanings: Altered form of Moree, itself perhaps an altered form of English or French Morey (compare 2 below) or of Irish Morrow .
English (London): variant of   Morey  . This surname is rare in Britain.
French: unexplained. This surname is rare in France.

nameMeanings.name: Fonia
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: pet form of Sofya ( see Sophia ), used as a given name in its own right in Britain and elsewhere since the 1920s.

en.lifeSummary: When Fonia Moray was born in 1145, in Elginshire, Scotland, her father, Ranulf de Moray, was 26 and her mother, Bethoc MacFergus of Moray, was 21. She married Ragnall Mac Somairle Lord of the Isles about 1160, in Scotland. They were the parents of at least 9 sons and 6 daughters. She died in 1200, in Kintyre, Argyll, Scotland, at the age of 55, and was buried in Kintyre, Argyll, Scotland.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Fonia Moray est née en 1145, à Elginshire, Écosse, son père, Ranulf de Moray, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Bethoc MacFergus of Moray, avait 21 ans. Elle a épousé Ragnall Mac Somairle Lord of the Isles environ 1160, à Écosse. Ils ont eu au moins 9 fils et 6 filles. Elle est décédée en 1200, à Kintyre, Argyll, Écosse, à l’âge de 55 ans, et a été enterrée à Kintyre, Argyll, Écosse.

de.lifeSummary: Als Fonia Moray 1145 in Elginshire, Scotland geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Ranulf de Moray 26 und ihre Mutter Bethoc MacFergus of Moray 21. Sie hat um 1160 in Scotland Ragnall Mac Somairle Lord of the Isles geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 9 Söhne und 6 Töchter. Sie starb 1200 im Alter von 55 Jahren in Kintyre, Argyll, Scotland und wurde in Kintyre, Argyll, Scotland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Fonia Moray è nata il nel 1145 nel Elginshire, Scotland, sua padre, Ranulf de Moray, aveva 26 anni e sua madre, Bethoc MacFergus of Moray, aveva 21 anni. Lei sposato Ragnall Mac Somairle Lord of the Isles circa 1160, nel Scotland. Erano genitori di almeno 9 figli e 6 figlie. Morì nel 1200, nel Kintyre, Argyll, Scotland, all'età di 55 anni, e fu sepolta a Kintyre, Argyll, Scotland.

ja.lifeSummary: Fonia Morayが1145年にスコットランドエルジンシュアイアで生まれた時，父Ranulf de Morayは26歳，母Bethoc MacFergus of Morayは21歳であった。約1160年にスコットランドでRagnall Mac Somairle Lord of the Islesと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも9人の息子と6人の娘の親であった。彼女は1200年にスコットランドアルグイルキントイアで55歳で死去し，スコットランドアルグイルキントイアにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Fonia Moray(이)가 1145년 스컷랜드 엘긴실르에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Ranulf de Moray(은)는 26세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Bethoc MacFergus of Moray(은)는 21세였다. 그녀는 대략 1160년 스컷랜드에서 Ragnall Mac Somairle Lord of the Isles(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 아홉 명의 아들과 여섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1200년 스컷랜드 아그이 킨타이어에서 55세의 나이로 사망했으며 스컷랜드 아그이 킨타이어에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Fonia Moray nasceu em 1145, em Elginshire, Scotland, seu pai, Ranulf de Moray, tinha 26 anos e sua mãe, Bethoc MacFergus of Moray, tinha 21 anos. Ela casou-se com Ragnall Mac Somairle Lord of the Isles aproximadamente 1160, em Scotland. Eles tiveram pelo menos 9 filhos e 6 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1200, em Kintyre, Argyll, Scotland, com 55 anos, e foi sepultada em Kintyre, Argyll, Scotland.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Fonia Moray родилась в 1145 г. в местности элгиншир, Шотландия, её отцу по имени Ranulf de Moray было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Bethoc MacFergus of Moray, 21. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Ragnall Mac Somairle Lord of the Isles около 1160 г. в местности Шотландия. У них было по крайней мере 9 сыновей и 6 дочерей. Она умерла в 1200 г. в местности кинтир, аргилл, Шотландия в возрасте 55 лет и была похоронена в местности кинтир, аргилл, Шотландия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Fonia Moray nació en 1145, en Elginshire, Scotland, su papá, Ranulf de Moray, tenía 26 años y su mamá, Bethoc MacFergus of Moray, tenía 21 años. Se casó con Ragnall Mac Somairle Lord of the Isles aproximadamente 1160, en Scotland. Fueron padres de por lo menos 9 hijos y 6 hijas. Murió en 1200, en Kintyre, Argyll, Scotland, a la edad de 55 años, y fue sepultada en Kintyre, Argyll, Scotland.
